info.name: Target Logistics API
info.description: Complete API collection for Target Logistics integration. Set the `api_key` variable to your key from Settings → General & API.

variable.description: Production API base URL. For local development use http://localhost:8899/api
Your API key from Settings → General & API

body.raw:
{
  "sender": {
    "company": "My Warehouse Co.",
    "contactPerson": "Ahmed Al-Rashid",
    "phone": "96512345678",
    "phoneCountryCode": "+965",
    "email": "warehouse@mycompany.com",
    "countryCode": "KW",
    "city": "Kuwait City",
    "postalCode": "13001",
    "streetLines": ["Industrial Area, Block 4, Street 12"]
  },
  "receiver": {
    "contactPerson": "Sara Al-Mutairi",
    "phone": "96598765432",
    "phoneCountryCode": "+965",
    "email": "sara@gmail.com",
    "countryCode": "KW",
    "city": "Salmiya",
    "postalCode": "22001",
    "streetLines": ["Block 12, Building 45, Apartment 3"]
  },
  "parcels": [
    { "weight": 2.5, "length": 30, "width": 20, "height": 10 }
  ],
  "items": [
    {
      "description": "Electronics",
      "quantity": 1,
      "unitValue": 150,
      "currency": "KWD",
      "countryOfOrigin": "KW"
    }
  ],
  "carrierCode": "DGR",
  "serviceCode": "P"
}

request.description: Creates a new shipment in draft status. Not yet booked with the carrier.
Update a shipment's details. Only works when status is draft, pending, or created.
Get live rate quotes. Rates include your organization's markup. Does not create a shipment.
Returns all addresses saved in your account's address book.

request.description: Add a new address to your account's address book.
Update an existing address. Partial update — only provide fields you want to change.

header.description: Unique key to prevent duplicate pickups on retry

request.description: Request a driver pickup. Always use an Idempotency-Key to safely retry without creating duplicates.

variable.description: Pickup request ID from Create Pickup response

request.description: Check the status of a pickup request. Poll this endpoint after creation.
Get status and history of a shipment using the internal tracking number.
Full shipment status including current location and history.
Returns merged events from both internal system and carrier (DGR/DHL), sorted chronologically. Each event includes a `source` field (INTERNAL or DHL).

variable.description: Share this link with end customers — no API key required

request.description: Public tracking endpoint. No authentication required. Safe to call from your customer-facing frontend.
